title: 33K views · 346 reactions | Liquidity sweep, break off structure, enter off of it, there you go. #trading #daytrading #tradingforbeginners #strategy | Tradingwithmustafah

segments.text: Did you know if we just waited for a high time for him to liquidate this week?
A break of structure to the opposite direction and put our stop-loss underneath the liquidity,
we will get a 1 to 2, 3 to 4 times a week.

full_text: Did you know if we just waited for a high time for him to liquidate this week? A break of structure to the opposite direction and put our stop-loss underneath the liquidity, we will get a 1 to 2, 3 to 4 times a week.
